CREATE TABLE test_directory_structure (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dir_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_directory_structure (id, dir_name) VALUES (1, 'test_dir_1');
INSERT INTO test_directory_structure (id, dir_name) VALUES (2, 'test_dir_2');
SELECT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_directory_structure WHERE dir_name LIKE 'test_dir_%');
CREATE TABLE permission_grants (user_id INT, permission VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO permission_grants (user_id, permission) VALUES (1, 'dba');
INSERT INTO permission_grants (user_id, permission) VALUES (2, 'read');
SELECT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_directory_structure);
CREATE TABLE directory_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, directory_name VARCHAR(255), action VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO directory_logs (log_id, directory_name, action) VALUES (1, 'test_dir_1', 'create');
INSERT INTO directory_logs (log_id, directory_name, action) VALUES (2, 'test_dir_2', 'create');
SELECT a.dir_name FROM test_directory_structure a JOIN permission_grants b ON a.id = b.user_id WHERE b.permission = 'dba';
INSERT INTO directory_logs (log_id, directory_name, action) VALUES (3, (SELECT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE id = 1), 'delete');
CREATE TABLE user_roles (user_id INT, role_name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_name) SELECT dba.id, 'admin' FROM permission_grants dba WHERE dba.permission = 'dba';
SELECT DISTINCT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE dir_name NOT IN (SELECT directory_name FROM directory_logs WHERE action = 'delete');
CREATE INDEX idx_dir_name ON test_directory_structure (dir_name);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_directory_structure WHERE dir_name IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_dir_structure (temp_id INT, temp_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_dir_structure (temp_id, temp_name) VALUES (1, (SELECT dir_name FROM test_directory_structure WHERE id = 1));
SELECT temp_name FROM temp_dir_structure WHERE temp_id = (SELECT MIN(temp_id) FROM temp_dir_structure);
DELETE FROM temp_dir_structure WHERE temp_name = 'some_nonexistent_directory';
